features: Glamorous gift containing our glossy lip trio in our Midnight Cherry fragrance
Perfect stocking filler or secret Santa gift
Must have items for any ladies handbag, for an on-the-go pick me up
description: Product Description For instant glam on-the-go, our glossy lip trio is the perfect stocking filler for this party season, beautifully fragranced with our new Midnight Cherry scent. Indulge in a decadent symphony of senses. This opulent fragrance opens with a tantalizing burst of tart, sour cherry, followed by a sophisticated liquor and a rich, creamy almond accord, leaving a lingering trail of luxurious elegance. Beautifully presented with sumptuous red tones accented with soft pink and bursts of firework luxe gold detailing, this collection is the perfect gift for a pop of party glamour this festive season. A seductive and enchanting blend, Midnight Cherry captures the essence of mystery and allure with its rich and decadent notes. Ingredients LIP GLOSS: Polybutene, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Tridecyltrimellitate, Hydroxystearic Acid, Silica Dimethyl Silylate, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Phenoxyethanol, O-Cymen-5-Ol, Tocopheryl Acetate, [+/- Ci 15850 (Red 7), Ci 15850 (Red 6), Ci 15985 (Yellow 6), Ci 42090 (Blue 1), Ci 77491 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77499 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77891 (Titanium Dioxide)]. Directions Lip Gloss - For External Use Only. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
